curation_notes: Re-curation: updated L1 area to be broader ('Social authentication and OAuth flow management') and differentiated L3 hints from L1/L2 to provide more targeted guidance. L3 area narrows to 'OAuth callback response processing and redirect URL navigation' and L3 description adds detail about URL scheme validation and the callback processing context. The vulnerability is in src/hello.js in the responseHandler function where the oauth_redirect URL parameter was decoded and passed directly to location.assign() without validation, enabling javascript: URI XSS. Only one source file was changed in the patch. Vulnerability class xss confirmed from CWE-79 and the patch adding isValidUrl() check.
